nasb.text: He divided the sea and caused them to pass through, And He made the waters stand up like a heap.

esv.text: He divided the sea and let them pass through it, and made the waters stand like a heap.

cnv.text: 他把海分開，領他們走過去， 又使海水直立像一道堤壩。

ccb.text: 祂把海水分开， 带领他们安然渡过； 祂使海水堆起如墙壁。

csbs.text: 他将海分开，使他们过去， 使众水立起如垒。
